name: Orzo with Parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boiling.
2. Add the orzo and stir constantly until boiling resumes.
3. Cook, stirring often, for 8 to 10 minutes until tender but firm to the bite.
4. Drain the orzo.
5. Return the orzo to the pot.
6. Stir in oil, parsley, and salt.
